title: rosa canina var. scabra
intro: Rosa canina var. scabra, also known as the rough-leaved dog rose, is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the family Rosaceae. The medicinal properties of Rosa canina var. scabra include its high content of vitamins, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Rosa canina var. scabra include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
